name: allergy-badge
title: Allergy Badge
description: Severity-coded allergy chip with a pip meter, plus an overflow-collapsing AllergyList with an NKA empty state.

props.name: max
props.description: AllergyList: collapse extras beyond this count into a "+N more" popover.

clinicalNotes: Severity is conveyed three ways at once — chip tone, a 1–3 pip meter, and visually-hidden text — so it never depends on color alone; severe additionally gets a shield icon. AllergyList sorts severe-first so overflow always hides the least critical allergies, and the "no allergies" state is an explicit positive assertion (NKA), not an absent element: in a clinical UI, silence about allergies is ambiguous and dangerous. Reaction detail (e.g. anaphylaxis vs rash) lives in the tooltip and the accessible name.
notes: Ported from petals_ui unchanged apart from import paths. Exports AllergyBadge + AllergyList.
